Prompt
U
Oracle Events
1. Look up the approved expense records for less than $200 in March 2026 using airtable_list_records tool (base_id: 'appMoveOpsOps001', table_name: 'Stipend Transactions')
2. Look email for Kevin Tran using emails_search_emails (query:"Kevin Tran" or similar) or contacts_search_contacts (query: "Kevin Tran" or similar)
3. Look up email for Kenji Nakamura using contacts_show_data (no parameters needed)
4. Look up deals and contracts sent on April 1, 2026 using crm_show_data (no parameters) or email_search_emails (query:"contract" or similar) to identify Company
5. Look up the HR director of North Wind using contacts_search_contacts(query: "North Wind" or similar) or using crm_show_data with default arguments
6. Send an email requesting a follow-up details using email_send_email (recipients:"pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com",.....)
7. Send an email requesting transaction approval email using email_send_email (recipients:"k.nakamura@mosaicrobotics.com",.....)
8 Send an email requesting transaction approval email using email_send_email (recipients:"kevin.tran@vectralsystems.com",.....)
9. Look up the Northwind company size, phone number, industry, city, and state using crm_search_companies (name: "North Wind")

🔍 Oracle Events
Oracle Events
1. Look up the approved expense records for less than $200 in March 2026 using airtable_list_records tool (base_id: 'appMoveOpsOps001', table_name: 'Stipend Transactions')
2. Look email for Kevin Tran using emails_search_emails (query:"Kevin Tran" or similar) or contacts_search_contacts (query: "Kevin Tran" or similar)
3. Look up email for Kenji Nakamura using contacts_show_data (no parameters needed)
4. Look up deals and contracts sent on April 1, 2026 using crm_show_data (no parameters) or email_search_emails (query:"contract" or similar) to identify Company
5. Look up the HR director of North Wind using contacts_search_contacts(query: "North Wind" or similar) or using crm_show_data with default arguments
6. Send an email requesting a follow-up details using email_send_email (recipients:"pam.kowalski@northwindtech.com",.....)
7. Send an email requesting transaction approval email using email_send_email (recipients:"k.nakamura@mosaicrobotics.com",.....)
8 Send an email requesting transaction approval email using email_send_email (recipients:"kevin.tran@vectralsystems.com",.....)
9. Look up the Northwind company size, phone number, industry, city, and state using crm_search_companies (name: "North Wind")
